caption: A group of people wearing aprons and gloves are gathered around a table, preparing kimchi together.
A person wearing black gloves is holding a piece of seasoned napa cabbage over a bowl filled with similar seasoned cabbage, indicating the process of making kimchi.
A group of children dressed in traditional white hanbok are waving South Korean flags, celebrating an event marked by the text "제104주년" on a banner.

The image depicts a group of six individuals, three men and three women, dressed in traditional and modern attire, with two of them holding the South Korean flag, symbolizing the Korean independence movement.
A woman stands in a traditional Korean setting, adorned in a vibrant red hanbok with intricate floral embroidery, complemented by a decorative headpiece.
A couple dressed in traditional Korean hanbok is seated at a ritual table adorned with various items, including a wooden mandarin duck and candles, as they partake in a cultural ceremony.

The image depicts a traditional Korean ancestral rite (Jesa) setup with a variety of food offerings on a wooden table, including fruits, pastries, and other items, set against a backdrop of calligraphy panels.
A group of people dressed in traditional Korean attire are gathered around a ritual table adorned with various food offerings, performing deep bows as part of an ancestral rite known as Jesa.
A group of people is standing in a line on a paved area, facing a statue and a stone monument, possibly participating in a solemn ceremony or remembrance event.

A group of seven men dressed in formal black suits and ties are gathered at a grave site, bowing their heads in respect as they stand in front of a white stone marker adorned with Korean script, with a small South Korean flag and a bouquet of white flowers placed nearby on the grassy ground.
The image depicts a stone tower illuminated at night, showcasing its cylindrical structure and square top frame, set against a dark sky.
The image depicts a large, ancient stone structure resembling a tower or observatory, situated in an open area surrounded by trees and distant hills under a clear sky.
A traditional Korean palace with ornate wooden pavilions, colorful dancheong paintwork, and raised stone platforms is illuminated against a deep blue sky.
The image depicts a traditional Korean palace with ornate wooden pavilions featuring upturned eaves and vibrant dancheong paintwork, situated on a raised stone platform.
A shallow urban stream flows through a rocky bed, bordered by stone embankments and surrounded by autumn-colored trees, with a pedestrian walkway and modern buildings in the background.
A statue of a figure in traditional Korean military attire stands prominently on a pedestal amidst a modern urban setting with fountains and trees.
A man and woman are performing a traditional Korean bow known as jeol and sebae, kneeling on the floor with their hands on the ground.
A family is gathered in a living room, with two children performing a traditional Korean bow known as Jeol and Sebae, while an adult sits nearby observing.

A group of people dressed in traditional Korean hanbok are gathered in a living room, engaging in a Jeol and Sebae, a Korean formal deep bow ritual, with one person kneeling and bowing deeply while others watch or participate.
A group of people stands in front of a large statue labeled "세종대왕," which depicts a seated figure in royal Joseon robes with a winged crown.
A statue of King Sejong the Great, seated in royal Joseon robes with a winged crown, stands prominently in front of a building adorned with Korean flags at dusk.
A person is flying a large, colorful kite in an open grassy field under a partly cloudy sky.
A person is flying a rainbow-colored kite in an open grassy field under a clear sky.
A group of people is gathered around a colorful floral mat on the floor, engaged in playing a traditional Korean board game called Yutnori.
Two children dressed in traditional Korean hanbok are sitting on the floor, playing a game involving wooden sticks and a game board.
A group of women dressed in traditional Korean hanbok are performing the Ganggangsullae dance in a large circle formation on a wooden platform near a body of water with a bridge in the background.
A group of women dressed in traditional Korean hanbok are performing a circular dance on a stage under a full moon.
A performer in traditional Korean attire, including a yellow top with a purple sash and a blue skirt, is dancing outdoors, wearing a white mask with red accents.
The image displays an array of colorful wooden masks with various facial expressions and intricate designs, hanging on a grid display.
A bowl of ramyeon with yellow curly noodles in an orange-red broth sits on a wooden table, accompanied by chopsticks resting on the rim of the bowl.
A steaming pot of ramyeon with yellow curly noodles in an orange-red broth is placed next to a glass container filled with kimchi on a white surface.
A box contains twelve pieces of gimbap, each featuring a variety of colorful fillings including shrimp, carrots, cucumbers, and sesame seeds, all wrapped in dark-green seaweed.
The image displays a plate of panfried battered meatballs, known as Wanja-jeon, featuring small round golden-brown patties coated with an egg batter.
The image displays an assortment of colorful, textured hangwa, traditional Korean confections, each adorned with small decorative pieces and featuring pressed floral or geometric patterns.
A box filled with an assortment of colorful, rectangular confections, each topped with small decorative pieces and pressed floral designs.
A bowl filled with a glossy mixture of sticky glutinous rice, chestnuts, jujubes, and pine nuts is placed on a checkered cloth atop a green placemat.
The image displays a plate of Yakgwa, featuring small, flower-shaped and round pastries with a dark golden-brown glossy glaze, garnished with green leaves and small white flowers.
The image depicts a large, round pan filled with a dish consisting of thinly sliced meat, onions, and green vegetables, all simmering in a rich, dark sauce.
A bowl of tteokguk and mandu soup is served with a variety of toppings including green onions, shredded cheese, and possibly meat, all set against a light-colored background.
A bowl of soup contains white oval slices of rice cake and crescent-shaped dumplings, garnished with a sprig of seaweed and a slice of green onion.
A plate of Japchae, featuring translucent brown noodles mixed with colorful julienned vegetables and topped with sesame seeds.
The image depicts a traditional Korean building with a tiled roof and ornate decorations, situated atop a stone wall under a clear blue sky.
The image depicts a serene scene of traditional Korean architecture with curved tile roofs and colorful eaves, surrounded by lush greenery under a clear blue sky.

The image depicts a traditional Korean gate known as Paldalmun Gate, part of the Hwaseong Fortress, featuring an arched stone gateway topped with a wooden pavilion and flanked by curved fortress walls.
The image depicts a modern architectural structure resembling an observation tower with a distinctive disc-shaped deck and a pointed spire, situated amidst lush greenery under an overcast sky.
A group of soldiers is gathered around a truck in a rural setting, possibly during a break or a moment of rest during their service.
The image depicts a desolate urban landscape with dilapidated buildings and overgrown vegetation, likely representing the aftermath of a war.
The image depicts a serene village scene with traditional thatched-roof houses and people gathered near a stone wall beside a body of water, set against a backdrop of rolling hills.
A family is playing jegichagi, a traditional Korean shuttlecock-kicking game, on a sunny day in a park.
A young boy dressed in traditional Korean attire is kicking a blue shuttlecock into the air.
